OUT: CRC (batch-52), flow.json persistence + external-import (batch-53).
route: full /dev-flow (new block kind + status-model change + untrusted-adjacent render + UI). Branch feat/batch-51-flow-builder off origin/main tip 2b285a8 (RC-1 clean).

scope_decisions.in_scope: CHECK block (read-only, pass-through, per-block gating flag advisory|block-own-op) + LOAD integrity-notices + status model (block 'notices' + flow 'completed-with-issues') + Direction A Pipeline-Ledger UI (block-node flow, status gutter, block separators, twin memory ribbon). Reuses shipped SOURCE/PATCH/WRITE-OUT.
scope_decisions.out_of_scope: CRC block -> batch-52 (template lib + address-space growth, ADR §7). flow.json save/load + external-file->import + variant reuse -> batch-53. PKI binary-region extraction + CRC-as-sub-flow + multi-image -> backlog.
scope_decisions.invariant: The CHAIN is never blocked. A block can mark ITSELF blocked only when its own operation is invalid. Validation/blocking rules are HIGHLY user-visible -> spec with max clarity (operator emphasis).
scope_decisions.prototype_validated: prototypes/flow_builder.prototype.py drove the abort-asymmetry (LOAD/PATCH failure breaks image->downstream skipped; CHECK failure keeps chain running, image intact); prototypes/flow_builder.screen.prototype.html = Direction A design source.

decisions_log.decision: Inc-2 design decision AMD-1 (autonomous, operator-awareness flag): ribbon carrier + twin->single
decisions_log.notes: Inc-2 software-dev correctly STOPPED before coding (rule 8) on a real blocker: the twin memory ribbon (LLR-088.4) had NO data source - Inc-1 FlowRunResult carries only a range COUNT in a summary string, not address extents; AND the 'twin' (before+image rows) is meaningless in batch-51 (no range-growing block - CRC=batch-52) -> two identical bars mislead. DECISION: (A) add additive FlowRunResult.image_ranges (populate final ranges at end of run_flow; sanctioned §6.3 R-6; re-opens the 2 Inc-1 engine files ADDITIVELY with full Inc-1 suite + frozen guard re-run to prove 0 regression) + render a SINGLE image ribbon in batch-51, NOT the twin. §6.5 AMD-1 recorded; LLR-088.4 + AT-088a + R-TUI-088 acceptance edited twin->single. The before-row/twin + the 'watch it grow' signature DEFER to batch-52 (CRC) where growth makes them meaningful. OPERATOR-AWARENESS FLAG: this defers the signature element the operator liked to batch-52 (reversible; two identical bars now would misrepresent). File budget stays 5. Agent re-briefed, implementing.
